Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Hariman]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 10''' — Hariman is a talking book with red-and-gold binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 10''' — Hariman has a face painted in gold on its cover that can come to life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Hariman is a red-and-gold book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Hariman is traveling with Denner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Hariman is the name of Denner’s talking book.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Hariman is a huge red-and-gold book that Denner carries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Hariman is a book that introduces Indirial to Simon.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Hariman is a huge book bound in red-and-gold that serves as Denner's advisor.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
